creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Support for ed25519 keys may not be sufficiently widespread yet (among ssh servers that users need to connect to); my intent is to make incremental improvement in main (choosing better algorithms by default and deprecating old ones) while avoiding surprises or regressions for users of stable branches and releases.

If/when we're confident that ed25519 support is sufficiently common this can be merged to the stable branches.
